prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: Hey there! I know that task has been weighing on you, but remember that every big achievement starts with that first step. You have the strength and capability to tackle this head-on. Just think about how good it will feel to check it off your list! Break it down into small, manageable parts if you need to, and reward yourself along the way. You’ve got this! Trust in your abilities, focus on progress, not perfection, and take it one moment at a time. Now take a deep breath, dive in, and show that task what you're made of! 🎉💪
